baseline.observed: jsonl_lines used map_while(Result::ok), so a line read error stopped iteration and returned earlier lines as if the file were complete.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because invalid UTF-8 returned Ok with the preceding valid line.

change.summary: jsonl_lines now iterates explicitly and propagates BufRead::lines errors.

verification.result: PASS: no temp invalid JSONL fixtures remained.
PASS: Vite build, 27 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: Started with a failing invalid UTF-8 fixture test.
Kept the change scoped to JSONL line reading.
